headlines.description: — Luka Doncic scored 43 points to lead the Los Angeles Lakers to a 137-130 victory over the Indiana Pacers on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Luka Doncic scores 43 as Lakers beat Pacers 137-130 with Caitlin Clark snapping photos

highlights.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Philadelphia 76ers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights) 2026/03/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Joel Embiid scored 35 points in his return to the lineup from injury, Paul George had 28 points in his first game since serving a 25-game suspension, and the Philadelphia 76ers rolled to a 157-137 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Embiid, George return to the lineup and lead Philadelphia 76ers past Chicago Bulls

video.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights

events.name: Oklahoma City Thunder at Boston Celtics

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 14 of his 31 points a pivotal third quarter and the Boston Celtics rallied to beat the Oklahoma City Thunder 119-109 on Wednesday night, snapping the defending champions’ 12-game win streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brown scores 31 as Celtics rally to beat Thunder 119-109, snapping OKC’s 12-game win streak

highlights.description: Miami Heat vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miami Heat vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights) 2026/03/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Norman Powell scored 19 points, Tyler Herro added 18 and the Miami Heat got contributions from everyone while stopping a five-game losing skid with a 120-103 win over the Cleveland Cavaliers on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Norman Powell scores 18, Heat use balanced attack to down Cavs 120-103 and snap 5-game skid

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Memphis Grizzlies

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 19 points, 15 rebounds and seven blocks as the San Antonio Spurs built an early lead and coasted to a 123-98 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama dominates inside as Spurs trounce Grizzlies 123-98
